THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROTHE, RICK THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 25 ELGIN PARK, APARTMENT #1, SF, CA $2,500.00 RENT, $2,000.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $600.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,100.00, STAYED UNTIL AUG-23-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
